heading: Powers
label: 151506 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15150636:2002., , .Aug. 9, 1982Pub. L. 97–231, § 296 Stat. 256The words “and subject to the laws of such State or States” are omitted as unnecessary.
